feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Display XML data for output forms in public cloud for forms displayed using Create Correspondence
entry.content:
Hi, 

We have code "#&&DOWNLOAD_FORM_DATA_XML&&#" that we can use to display the xml data for forms that are displayed using output configuration but there are few forms that are displayed via std. apps or create correspondence like FI forms, COA forms and so on

Do we have any way that we can check the xml data for these forms as well?

entry.title: Custom Business Object - Assign UI App to Developed Business Catalog
entry.content:
Hi,

We have developed several CBO's and then we have created Business Catalogs using developer extensibility.

Is it possible to add these CBOs to the developed Business Catalogs?

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: KONH - how to identify deleted conditions?
entry.content: KONH does not have position number that KONP has. The same KNUMH in KONP shows one KOPOS deleted while other is not. How to identify KONH condition records that have been flagged for deletion. KONH has condition header number + condition item number combo listed as VAKEY though.

entry.title: Is there any difference in the APIs between S/4HANA Cloud and S/4HANA onPremise?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using API to integrate with S/4HANA Cloud. We also want to use the same code to support S/4HANA onPremise. So here we want to confirm with you, is there any difference in the APIs between Cloud and On-Prem?

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Field Control in odata v4
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to implement field control in OData V4. Please provide some guidance on how this can be accomplished.

@Andre_Fischer   @amit_singh08  @Sandra_Rossi @CarineTchoutouo

entry.title: Legacy Business Object with Parent Key
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to use BOPF with already existing tables, so I use the DAC /BOBF/CL_DAC_LEGACY_TABLE. I have the problem that fields in relation to each other have a different name.

Fields Table A:

ID

Titel

 

Fields Table B:

ID

PARENT_ID

Parameter

Every table has their own ID-field names 'ID'. Entries of table B are in relation to table A via the PARENT_ID field.

The BOPF has table A as root and table B as subnote. I created an alternative key ‘DB_KEY’ for the root, with a structure containing only the ID field. The subnote uses this structure for the parent key. In Addison the subnote has it’s one ‘DB_KEY’, with a structure containing the ID and the PARENT_ID

Unfortunately, BOPF is connection the tables via the ID field at the moment which is wrong. It need to be connected from PARENT_ID to ID.

Is there a way to tell the BO how it should work? Maybe with an association class or redefining the DAC?

Thanks.

entry.title: How to include stock type X in MRP run
entry.content:
Dear team 

How to include stock type X in MRP run.

 

 

BR

entry.title: How to get list of all internal tables present in any report/program?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am building a program wherein I will enter any program name in the selection screen and it will display all the internal tables even in-line declarations to me.

I have tried program scanning but since different naming conventions are used and it is near to impossible to track the inline declarations throughout the program it is not sustainable for all programs.

Can anyone help me with any FM or any piece of code through which I can get the list of all internal tables?


For clarity lets suppose my program is Zdriver_prog and on its selection screen i will enter a program name lets say zproduct_details. Now the output should be all the internal tables used in zproduct_details.

entry.title: How to find a table or FM for field details in module pool programming?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

I have a module pool program in which i have different elements radio button, button, input field, output field etc.

Now I need to access all the information about these fields such as field name, description, type, I/O field, length, Default and Dict Ref.

Is there any table or FM to get this information. 

I have already tried d020s, d021s, d022s, d023s these tables and couldn't find this information.

entry.title: I am using BAPI BAPI_CTRACDOCUMENT_CREATE giving error as " product group not defined".
entry.content:
I am using BAPI BAPI_CTRACDOCUMENT_CREATE which is giving error" for combination of HVORG,TVORG,BUKRS -PRODUCT GROUP IS NOT DEFINED".

I am passing the value HVORG,TVORG,BUKRS in partnerposition table parameter.I can see in database table for these combination product group value is there.In BAPI I cannot find any parameter to pass value for productgroup nor it is getting selected from any database table internally in BAPI.Then how this productgroup field is coming into picture and giving error.

entry.title: Abap : Loop at bapi function module not working
entry.content: Hello i have a problem with loop,, date retrieve 1 time at first tabx and when debugging i see tabx not going to tabx 2 or 3 and fm not retrieve any data really i cant understand.. image for code attched

entry.title: Transaction Variant creation for t-code CJ8G
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Can anyone please share step by step guidelines to create transaction variant for t-code CJ8G . My requirement is that after creation of transaction variant , need to create a Z-tcode so that when user runs this Z-tcode , system defaults the transaction variant . Need to create multiple transaction variant for different company codes and multiple Z-tcode for these transaction variant .

Thanking you very much in advance .

Best Regards 

Mohammed

entry.title: ABAP cds or ABAP AMDP
entry.content:
ABAP Community,

can you tell me when to use Abap cds and when ABAP amdps?

pls illustrate with some real time examples / or Any business  requirement which has been met with implementing AMDPs and not CDS . 

ANIL

entry.title: Is there a standard S4/HANA api available for reading/creating / deleting SO10 Texts?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there a standard S4/HANA api available for reading/creating/deleting SO10 Texts from outside S4/HANA on-premise system

Best wishes,

Ramjee Korada

entry.title: POWER BI Resource Usage
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a Cube that is consumed in MS Power BI. This Cube uses a CDS table function. When we try to retrieve data from this Cube, MS Power BI creates about 20 sessions in SM04 and consumes about 4-5 DAI in SM50, resulting in the production server slowing down significantly.

Cube annotation

@EndUserText.label: 'xxxxx'
@VDM.viewType: #COMPOSITE
@AccessControl: {
  authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED,
  personalData.blocking: #('TRANSACTIONAL_DATA'),
  privilegedAssociations: ['_CreatedByUser']
}
@AbapCatalog: {
  sqlViewName: 'xxxxx',
  compiler.compareFilter: true,
  preserveKey: true
}
@ObjectModel: {
  usageType: {
    dataClass:      #MIXED,
    serviceQuality: #D,
    sizeCategory:   #XL
  }
}
@Analytics.dataCategory: #CUBE
@Metadata: {
  allowExtensions: true,
  ignorePropagatedAnnotations:true
}

entry.title: Error in Scrap Sales Order
entry.content:
While creating scrap sale order below error occurred. Please do the needful.
"Material 8000000011 is not defined for sales org. D001, distr.chan.40, language EN" 
"Sales from sales organization, D001 dist. chan.40, plant D101 are not defined"

entry.title: Period of performance field not in the BAPI
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have a task to create a MIRO document using the BAPI BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE1, but I'm unable to find the PEROP_BEG_MM and PEROP_END_MM fields in the BAPI. Is there a way to activate these fields? How does this work, considering they are available in MIRO; they should also be available in the BAPI.

Your assistance on this matter would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: can inspection lot results be carried to other plant with same batch
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have scenario where we do STO between plants (produce and inspect at origin plant ). However, I do not want to repeat inspecting the material at the destination plant after GR.

Please note we use same batch number for GI & GR (from origin plant and destination plant) and for STO process we use both 641 and 643 movement types.

I would like to know :

  1. Is there any SAP standard functionality where I can get inspection lot results from origin plant since I am using same batch (both at origin and destination plants) without repeating inspection/UD/result entry at destination plant.
  2. If I have to go with a custom solution, I believe I can trace the inspection lot results using Batch number and plant combination, please correct me if I am wrong.

Your help is much appreciated.

entry.title: F4 Help in Custom Analytic Query
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to create F4 help to Custom analytic query, I added below annotation to make field act as filter but I tried various ways to add Value help but without any success. field is not parameterized, it is made filter by addition below annotation form projection list.

@Consumption.filter: {selectionType: #INTERVAL, multipleSelections: true, mandatory: false}

Can you please guide how to achieve it

Ankesh

entry.title: How is the patch algorithm for CL_ABAP_DIFF?
entry.content:
I was exploring the new system class CL_ABAP_DIFF which detects differences between internal tables. According to the documentation, its return value is a diff table, to be understood as a sequence of instructions that have to be applied to the source table in order to get the target table. 

Unfortunately, my naïve approach to write a `patch` algorithm for applying the diff data to the source table doesn't work. 

       loop at lt_diff assigning field-symbol(<ls_diff>).
         case <ls_diff>-operation.
           when cl_abap_diff=>s_operation-delete.
             delete lt_source index <ls_diff>-source_line_number.
           when cl_abap_diff=>s_operation-insert.
             insert lt_target[ <ls_diff>-target_line_number ] 
               into lt_source index <ls_diff>-source_line_number.
           when cl_abap_diff=>s_operation-update.
             modify lt_source 
               from lt_target[ <ls_diff>-target_line_number ] 
               index <ls_diff>-source_line_number.
         endcase.
       endloop.

Any suggestions how to fix this patch algorithm so that after the loop we have lt_source = lt_target?
